Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 20}Sometimes you will encounter {f 0 1 2}missing persons{f 0 1 27} who have wandered into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Missing persons cannot be rescued {f 0 1 2}after a full moon{f 0 1 27}, so it's best to save anyone you find as soon as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can {f 0 1 2}receive a reward at the police station{f 0 1 27} the day after a successful rescue, so don't forget to stop by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can {f 0 1 2}ask Elizabeth{f 0 1 27} where the missing persons are located. Seek her advice regularly to rescue those who are lost in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
